nasb.text: Also I scattered them among the nations and they were dispersed throughout the lands. According to their ways and their deeds I judged them.

esv.text: I scattered them among the nations, and they were dispersed through the countries. In accordance with their ways and their deeds I judged them.

cnv.text: 我使他們分散在列邦，四散在各地；我按著他們的所作所為審判他們。

ccb.text: 把他们驱散到列国，分散到列邦，照他们的行为报应他们。
